  • Method Details

    • postMessage

      @POST("https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage") retrofit2.Call<SuccessfulMessage> postMessage(@Body SimpleMessageModel body)

      @POST("https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage") retrofit2.Call<Object> postThreadMessage(@Body ThreadMessageModel body)

    • postMultipartMessage

      @FormUrlEncoded @POST("https://slack.com/api/files.upload") retrofit2.Call<Object> postMultipartMessage(@Part okhttp3.MultipartBody.Part file, @Part("initial_comment") okhttp3.RequestBody comment, @Part("channels") okhttp3.RequestBody channelId)

      @Multipart @POST("https://slack.com/api/files.upload") retrofit2.Call<Object> postMultipartThreadMessage(@Part okhttp3.MultipartBody.Part file, @Part("initial_comment") okhttp3.RequestBody comment, @Part("channels") okhttp3.RequestBody channelId, @Part("thread_ts") okhttp3.RequestBody thread_ts)
